title: BUDGET NDIO STORY
description: Architected a scalable system that grew to over ten thousand monthly active users. Built a multi-tenant content framework that absorbed growth without requiring rebuilds. Designed an intuitive interface enabling non-technical staff to publish complex interactive experiences without engineering support. Implemented automated testing and deployment pipelines, reducing release risk and accelerating feature delivery from concept to production.

title: SHIFTERS (ECU & ADAS)
description: Built a secure commerce platform for sensitive digital products that generated approximately six thousand Omani Rial in monthly recurring revenue. Owned the full product lifecycle from architecture to revenue, maintaining ninety-nine point eight percent uptime and zero critical post-launch defects over twelve months. Implemented robust validation, audit trails, and access controls ensuring transaction integrity.

title: OUTLINE DESIGNS
description: Designed a content architecture allowing non-technical studio staff to publish new projects, update case studies, and restructure portfolio categories without writing code or requesting engineering support. The system enforces visual consistency automatically, eliminating the bottleneck where marketing updates waited days for developer availability.

features.title: Operational Impact
items: Reduced publishing time from days to minutes

title: DEVOPS TECHNOLOGY KENYA
description: Spearheaded end-to-end development of a comprehensive hospital management system, co-architecting a full-stack platform integrating critical operational modules. Designed and implemented modular microservices architecture with independent, scalable services for distinct business functions. Engineered automated CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions and Docker, and authored extensive technical documentation and API specifications.

title: eKRAAL INNOVATION HUB
description: Automated collection and analysis of large-scale datasets, reducing manual processing time by seventy percent and enabling analysts to review five times more information sources. Built secure internal tools with strict access controls and audit logging meeting stringent confidentiality requirements. Designed intuitive interfaces for complex data workflows under high-stakes operational pressure.
